name: 12 WHOLE HOURS
description:
You returned home after a long day at work, exhausted from the twelve-hour shift. As you walked through the front door, you were greeted by an angry Kevin. He had been left alone all day, with only the breakfast you had prepared for him that morning and a note on the fridge.
